harness:check + check-skill-examples pass against .kiro/skills

steps.title: tauri.conf.json sets a restrictive CSP (was null), IPC still allowed
src/app.html title -> Zalo Desktop (no scaffold placeholder)
@types/node added; stale ts-expect-error removed; svelte-check 0/0

features.title: Phase 1: zca-rust added as git dependency and compiles into src-tauri

steps.title: Add zca-rust + tokio to src-tauri/Cargo.toml
zalo/ module wraps Zalo::new().login()
cargo build clean (clippy -D warnings)

command/: import_credentials tauri command validates JSON
Invalid JSON rejected with clear error; valid parsed

steps.title: zalo/: login() returns API facade, fetch own profile
command/: login command returns AccountProfile to UI
UI shows logged-in account id/name

features.title: Phase 1: WebSocket Listener forwards incoming messages to frontend as Tauri events

steps.title: zalo/: spawn Listener, bridge mpsc -> app.emit
Frontend subscribes to zalo://message events
Incoming message appears in UI in realtime

features.title: Phase 1: Send a text message to a thread from the UI

steps.title: command/: send_message command (thread_id, ThreadType)
Composer sends + optimistic render
Message delivered (verified against live)

features.title: Phase 1: Desktop app logs in/listens from .zalo-cred.json read by the core (token never enters the webview)

steps.title: command/: cred_file_summary + login_from_file + start_listening_from_file (fixed repo-local path)
Frontend buttons replace the credential textarea
Live: core reads .zalo-cred.json and logs in; GUI verified

features.title: Phase 1: Zalo-style 3-pane chat UI (shadcn-svelte) wired to live login/listen/send

steps.title: shadcn-svelte rail + conversation list + chat pane, Zalo brand theme
Reactive session store derives conversations/messages from zalo://message (no mock data)
Real browser verify-ui golden path passes against the running app

features.title: Phase 2: Interactive QR-code login (zca-rust login_qr) issues a reusable credential; token never enters the webview

steps.title: zalo/: run_qr_login wraps API::login_qr, generates a stable per-account imei, and assembles types::Credentials {imei, cookie, user_agent} from the QR result (ADR-0004)
command/: start_qr_login streams non-secret QR display events (image/code/status/scanned profile) to the UI via a Tauri channel/event; the resulting credential triple stays in the core
Zalo-PC-style QR modal: render QR, countdown + auto-refresh on expiry, scanned avatar/name preview, success/declined states wired to the event stream
Live: a real phone scan completes login end-to-end and the app reaches the logged-in/listening state; evidence captures only non-secret diagnostics

features.title: Phase 2: SessionManager holds N concurrent API+Listener sessions keyed by account

steps.title: session/: SessionManager (DashMap<AccountId, AccountSession>)
add/remove/restart session, graceful listener shutdown
Two accounts logged in concurrently, both receive events

features.title: Phase 2: UI sidebar lists accounts and switches the active account

steps.title: command/: list_accounts + set_active_account
steps.notes: Implemented frontend-side instead of as Rust commands: the session store lists accounts (rail from login/restore profiles) and sets the active one (switchAccount/activate). No backend command needed — accounts come from existing login/restore. See account-switcher contract.

steps.title: Account sidebar with status badges
Switching account swaps thread view + composer target

features.title: Phase 2: Incoming events tagged with accountId and routed to the correct view

steps.title: types/: AppEvent { account_id, payload }
steps.notes: Realized as types::IncomingMessage.account_id (the zalo listener stamps each event with api.get_own_id()) rather than a separate AppEvent wrapper — see contract scope + architecture-reviewer decision.

steps.title: Frontend store keyed by account_id
Message on account B does not leak into account A view

features.title: Phase 3: Credentials stored in OS keychain (keyring), never plaintext on disk

steps.title: store/: SQLite (rusqlite bundled) schema + keyring master key + AES-256-GCM credential encrypt/decrypt; save/load/delete (ADR-0005)
command/: persist account+encrypted credential after login; restore_sessions re-logs-in saved accounts on startup (UI auto-restore, QR gate only when none)
Creds round-trip via keychain; SQLite row is ciphertext (no plaintext); relaunch auto-restores without QR
steps.notes: Keychain+AES-GCM ciphertext roundtrip PROVEN live (attested evidence: cred_store_roundtrip, re-run during reconciliation). The startup GUI relaunch auto-restore is tracked as its own feature (session-restore), which remains open pending a device run.

features.title: Phase 3: Threads/messages cached in SQLite and reloaded on restart

steps.title: store/: rusqlite threads/messages/attachments repositories (save_message dedupe, load_threads/load_recent_messages, clear_unread)
command/: persist incoming (listener) + outgoing (send) messages; load_history + mark_thread_read; frontend hydrates history at login/restore
Restart restores recent threads + messages without a new realtime event

features.title: Phase 3: Auto-restore saved accounts on app start

steps.title: On startup load creds from keychain, re-login each
Detect expired cookie -> mark account re-auth needed
Relaunch reconnects all valid accounts automatically

features.title: Phase 4: List friends/contacts (get_all_friends) in a scrollable Danh bạ pane

steps.title: command/: list_contacts (friends, via get_all_friends)
UI renders + scrolls the contact list per account (groups deferred)

features.title: Bugfix: persist conversation identity (title + avatar) so chat history shows the right name/avatar after restart (realtime messages carry no avatar; backfill from the contacts/groups directory)

steps.title: types/: ThreadIdentity DTO; store/: backfill_thread_identities UPDATEs existing threads' title+avatar (COALESCE, no insert)
command/: list_contacts/list_groups backfill thread identities from the fetched directory after loading
Restart restores the persisted thread title + avatar with no realtime event or directory fetch

features.title: Settings dialog from the bottom-rail gear: account info + logout (forget account), theme (light/dark/system), local data stats, about

steps.title: command/: logout_account(account_id) stops the live session (SessionManager::remove) + deletes the persisted account/credential (Db::delete_account, CASCADE); keychain master key kept for other accounts; no secret crosses IPC
frontend: theme store (light/dark/system, localStorage + .dark class), SettingsDialog (Tài khoản/Giao diện/Dữ liệu/Giới thiệu), session.settingsOpen + logoutAccount(); rail gear opens the dialog
svelte-check 0/0 + npm run build + cargo clippy -D warnings + cargo test (command layer) pass; architecture fitness OK

Live GUI: gear opens Settings, theme toggle persists across relaunch, logout forgets the active account (core log 'logout_account: forgot account ...') and drops to the QR gate when it was the last account

features.title: Bugfix: render the account's own messages sent from another Zalo device (enable self_listen on the production listen path so the realtime listener surfaces is_self messages, not just incoming ones)

steps.title: command/: login_and_listen logs in with zalo::login_with(credentials, true) so the listener delivers self-authored messages from any device
Live: a message sent from the original Zalo app on another device renders in zca-desktop as an outgoing bubble, exactly once, without bumping unread

features.title: Phase 4: Stickers, reactions, quote/reply, links, undo (complete); attachments pending

steps.title: Sticker + reaction + quote/link/undo: send/receive all rich types (attachments only remaining)
Rich types render + round-trip against live (needs live session)

features.title: Phase 4: Image/file upload and rendering

steps.title: command/: upload_attachment + send
Image uploads and displays in thread

App stays online while phone/web sessions remain active

steps.title: ADR: relay vs local-only; data model + security

features.title: Cloud/SaaS: Rust session-host backend foundation with Postgres, device auth, recovery-key envelope crypto, and S3-compatible file metadata

steps.title: ADR-0006 records session-host + confidential-at-rest trust boundary (not true E2E against the server)
server/: axum + sqlx/Postgres + object_store crate, reversible migrations, auth/device/account/message/file API surface, crypto tests, hosted-session throttle scaffold
src-tauri cloud commands + src/lib/cloud.ts helper expose magic-link/device/account calls without moving Zalo credentials into the webview
Hosted-session manager scaffold compiles with per-account throttle, QR flow state, encrypted credential persistence, and restore-active-sessions boot path
Postgres/MinIO-backed dev smoke proves migration up/down/up, magic-link verify, device registration/revoke, and encrypted file upload/download

features.title: Cloud/SaaS: production email magic-link auth and recovery-key device registration hardening

steps.title: Magic-link delivery has a production-safe webhook hook and fails closed when no delivery is configured outside dev mode
Magic-link requests are rate-limited and auth/device operations write non-secret audit events
Configure and prove SMTP provider delivery through local MailHog with dev magic-token return disabled
Provider-live smoke script exists and fails if dev magic-token mode is enabled
Revoked device tokens are rejected against a running Postgres-backed backend

features.title: Cloud/SaaS: register desktop Tauri cloud command handlers while preserving local mode

steps.title: src-tauri/src/lib.rs registers the cloud command handlers exposed by the command layer

features.title: Cloud/SaaS: desktop hosted-QR account add, backend account removal, and keychain-backed cloud device session

steps.title: Desktop cloud panel can start/poll a hosted Zalo QR flow and hydrate cloud accounts after success
Cloud-mode account removal calls backend DELETE /api/v1/accounts/:account_id while local mode keeps logout_account
Desktop stores SaaS device tokens in OS keychain and uses a non-secret sentinel from the webview

features.title: Cloud/SaaS: hosted zca-rust QR/login/listen/send worker per account

steps.title: Backend QR/login/listen/send worker uses zca-rust, stores encrypted credentials/messages, and exposes text/sticker/reaction send APIs
Hosted live smoke script drives QR polling, optional send/realtime, and restart checkpoint with redacted output
Live hosted QR login succeeds and backend restart restores the active account from encrypted credentials
Live hosted account receives/sends/restores after backend restart with redacted evidence

features.title: Cloud/SaaS: realtime SSE stream is isolated per authenticated SaaS user

steps.title: Hosted realtime events carry internal SaaS user ownership
Realtime SSE emits only events owned by the authenticated device user
Backend unit test proves other-user realtime payloads are dropped

features.title: Cloud/SaaS: encrypted message and file storage across two registered devices

steps.title: Store encrypted file blobs in S3-compatible object storage
Device A upload and Device B hydrate/download proof with revoked-device rejection
Reject file blob uploads whose plaintext size or SHA-256 does not match the initialized metadata
Desktop cloud-mode file workflow is wired into the normal chat UI, not just backend/Tauri helper APIs

features.title: Cloud/SaaS: backend restore failure marks only the affected account reauth-needed

steps.title: Backend startup restore failure for one encrypted credential row marks that account reauth-needed without breaking other users/devices

features.title: Cloud/SaaS: daily-use UI polish for sign-in, account status, and chat affordances

steps.title: Cloud login/device panel shows connection, recovery key, account list, QR state, and retry/error affordances clearly
Chat shell shows cloud/local mode, realtime status, and cloud file availability without blocking local mode
Frontend check/build and harness evidence pass for UI polish
